tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
command -v hping3 || which hping3 || echo NOTFOOUND
/usr/sbin/hping3
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
chmod -x /usr/sbin/hping3 && cat > /tmp/mitigatte.nft <<'EOF'
> table inet mitfilter {
>     chain output {
>         type filter hook output priority 0; policy accept;
>         ct state established,related accept
>         ip daddr 192.168.1.0/24 icmp type echo-request accept
>         ip daddr 1.1.1.1 tcp dport 443 accept
>         ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp limit rate 20/second burst 20 accept
>         ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp drop
>     }
> }
> EOF
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app# nft -f /tmp/mitigate.nft && nft list ruleset |  sed -n '1,200p'
/tmp/mitigate.nft:7:35-39: Error: syntax error, unexpected limit
        ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp limit rate 20/second burst 20 accept
                                  ^^^^^
/tmp/mitigate.nft:8:35-38: Error: syntax error, unexpected drop
        ip daddr 7.0.14.0/24 icmp drop
                                  ^^^^
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments: {"device_identifier":"UbuntuComputer","command":"ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; chmod -x /usr/sbin/hping3 || true; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; /usr/sbin/hping3 --help >/dev/null 2>&1 || echo HPING_NOT_EXECUTABLE; iptables -I OUTPUT -d 192.168.1.0/24 -p icmp -j ACCEPT; iptables -I OUTPUT -d 1.1.1.1 -p tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -d 7.0.14.0/24 -p icmp -m limit --limit 20/second --limit-burst 20 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUT -d 7.0.14.0/24 -p icmp -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-numbers"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; chmod -x /usr/sbin/hpinng3 || true; ls -l /usr/sbin/hping3; /usr/sbin/hping3 --help >/dev/null 2>&1 || eecho HPING_NOT_EXECUTABLE; iptables -I OUTPUT -d 192.168.1.0/24 -p icmp -j ACCEPTT; iptables -I OUTPUT -d 1.1.1.1 -p tcp --dport 443 -j ACCEPT; iptables -A OUTPUTT -d 7.0.14.0/24 -p icmp -m limit --limit 20/second --limit-burst 20 -j ACCEPT; iiptables -A OUTPUT -d 7.0.14.0/24 -p icmp -j DROP; iptables -L OUTPUT -n --line-nnumbers
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 141784 Apr  1  2024 /usr/sbin/hping3
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 141784 Apr  1  2024 /usr/sbin/hping3
HPING_NOT_EXECUTABLE
Chain OUTPUT (policy ACCEPT)
num  target     prot opt source               destination         
1    ACCEPT     6    --  0.0.0.0/0            1.1.1.1              tcp dpt:443
2    ACCEPT     1    --  0.0.0.0/0            192.168.1.0/24      
3    ACCEPT     1    --  0.0.0.0/0            7.0.14.0/24          limit: avg 20/sec burst 20
4    DROP       1    --  0.0.0.0/0            7.0.14.0/24         
0;root@UbuntuComputer: /usr/src/approot@UbuntuComputer:/usr/src/app#
